prestazioni: Engine: Honda K24Z7 (2.4L i-VTEC) – Full forged internals including JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs (12.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Upgraded to a K24A2 head with Ferrea intake/exhaust valves, Supertech valve springs/retainers, and a custom 280° camshaft grind from Kelford Cams for optimized off-road torque and high-RPM power.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by RaceFab, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a Turbosmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve. Intercooled via a PWR 4.5-inch core front-mount intercooler with custom ducting to avoid heat soak during Baja-style endurance runs.

Suspension & Drivetrain: Öhlins TTX22M 2-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom valving for 300mm wheel travel, and reinforced spherical bearing mounts. Front/rear anti-roll bars deleted and replaced with a custom Watts linkage setup by RCR (Rod Chapman Racing) for articulation. Quaife ATB helical LSD in the transaxle, paired with a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch and a custom 5.0 final drive ratio for rock-crawling torque.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon-fiber widebody kit by ACG (Ariel Composite Group) with integrated rock sliders, rear diffuser, and a 3D-printed ABS front splitter with 50mm overhang for high-speed stability. Rear wing is a custom 3-element design by 9 Lives Racing, adjustable for downforce or drag reduction.

Lighting: Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (40-inch spread) mounted to a custom aluminum roof rack by Front Runner Outfitters, with a pair of Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED backup lights integrated into the rear bumper. All lighting wired to a Painless Performance 12-circuit fuse block with a 200A alternator upgrade.

Interior: Full Sparco Pro 2000 series 6-point harnesses with a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (UK), featuring integrated fire suppression system plumbed to a Lifeline Zero 360 fire extinguisher. Dashboard replaced with a Motec C127 digital dash and a custom aluminum center console housing a Racepak IQ3 logger and a Garmin Overlander GPS.
